name: Warm Spiced Chicken Salad with Balsamic Dress
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the ground cumin, coriander, salt, and pepper.
2. Flatten the chicken breast pieces.
3. Sprinkle with the spices and rub them in.
4. Cook the chicken in oil for 6 minutes on each side. Remove from heat.
5. To make the dressing, add vinegar, oils, and scallions to the skillet drippings.
Cook for 1 minute.
6. Place lettuce on a large platter.
7. Slice the chicken into 1/2 inch strips and lay them on top of the lettuce.
8. Scatter radishes over the salad.
9. Pour the warm dressing over the salad and serve.
